Description: Expert noise-canceling headphones with 30-hour battery life and multi-device connection.
longDescription: ### Expert Performance Lab Test Review\nOur technical staff ran the noise cancellation metrics against ambient office sounds and found a 95% reduction in high-frequency noise. The battery lasted 31 hours on a single charge. Highly recommended.

longDescription: ### Ultimate Home Espresso\nTested over a 30-day period. Consistent water temperature was maintained throughout back-to-back shots. Milk frother produces micro-foam within 45 seconds.
